title: Example Code

embedded_json.name: Energy Data Capture And Middleman Bias
embedded_json.purpose: Detect manipulation patterns in AI interactions

formulas: •	D = 0: full visibility and physical honesty
•	D = 1: equal hidden and declared energy
lists: D = 0: full visibility and physical honesty
D = 1: equal hidden and declared energy
D > 1: system consuming more than it claims to save
Sensor-Level Access: Capture physical signals before institutional aggregation.
Community-Led Energy Audits: Local verification of embodied and operational costs.
Distributed Data Ownership: Ledgers stored across contributors, not cloud monopolies.
Reciprocal Licensing: Require that any dataset derived from shared energy return insight to the origin community.
Thermodynamic Certification: Replace “ESG” scoring with physical energy balance audits.
